title: Fix audible background audio, add Home-page strobe effect, and expand Auditions roles with descriptions

requirements.text: Fix the website background audio so the chainsaw loop is reliably audible for users, while still handling browser autoplay restrictions gracefully. The site must provide a clear user gesture path that starts playback successfully when autoplay is blocked, and once enabled the audio must continue looping across the session.

quotes: Add the fixed sound system cause I can’t hear it
Add strobe effects on the home page, add the audio fixed and you can hear it add the sound effect is a chainsaw sound have the audio fixed and played on

acceptanceCriteria: On a fresh load where autoplay is blocked, the UI shows an “Enable Sound” prompt; clicking it successfully starts the looping audio.
When sound is enabled, the chainsaw loop is clearly audible at a reasonable volume (not near-silent).
The existing sound control (mute/unmute) continues to work and accurately reflects whether audio is currently playing.
No console errors are produced during normal playback, mute/unmute, and unmount cleanup.

requirements.text: Add strobe/flash background effects on the Home page only (the #home hero section), matching the existing black-and-green horror style without reducing text readability.

quotes: Add strobe effects on the home page

acceptanceCriteria: A visible strobe/flash lighting effect is present in the Home hero background area only; other sections are unaffected.
Home hero text and buttons remain readable during the effect (no prolonged full-white flashes covering content).
Respect accessibility: if the user prefers reduced motion, the strobe/flash effect is disabled or significantly reduced.

requirements.text: Expand the Auditions section to include the new audition roles “Costume Manager” and “Masks Manager”, each with a short scary English description, while keeping the existing audition dates/hours and the existing roles list intact.

quotes: Add the new AUDTION roles and description
Fix the audio add sound on, add description for new audition roles
add description for new audition roles

acceptanceCriteria: “Costume Manager” and “Masks Manager” appear in the Auditions section as roles.
Each of the two new roles includes a short scary description in English displayed in the Auditions UI.
Existing Auditions info remains unchanged: dates (February 7th – March 2nd, 2026), hours (10:00 AM – 9:00 PM), and the existing role entries (including “And Many More...”).

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Keep the existing single-actor backend architecture; no backend changes are required for these requests.
nonGoals: Do not add new backend functionality or persistence for audio settings (no backend state for user preferences).
Do not add new audio tracks beyond the existing audio assets unless explicitly requested.
Do not apply strobe/flash effects site-wide; Home page only.
